description:
Adds an automated action on survey.user_input that flags Star Candidates
based on TWO assessment scores combined:
  - Logical assessment score >= 90%
  - Technical assessment score >= 80%
Both surveys must be completed before the alert fires. The submission
of either Logical OR Technical re-checks the condition; submissions of
the Emotional / Info / other surveys do not (early-exit guard).

When the gate passes, the action:
  - bumps applicant.priority to '3' (★★★)
  - posts a chatter alert tagging the assigned recruiter
    (user_id.partner_id) so they get an inbox notification
  - logs a "MANAGEMENT" trail line

Idempotency: if applicant.priority is already '3', the alert is skipped
to avoid spamming the recruiter on assessment retakes.

Pure routing — no fields, no templates, no schedule. Coexists with
other survey.user_input.on_write automations (e.g. info-survey
adjudication); each automation runs independently.
